projects.title: AI Content Systems at Intuit
projects.tagline: Designing AI-assisted content infrastructure to scale clarity, consistency, and access
projects.summary: Built an AI-assisted content system that structured ~4,000 help articles, enabling faster authoring, consistent reuse, and expanded access for support teams.

projects.title: Lacerte Forms Help
projects.tagline: Designing in-product, form-level guidance within a regulated tax environment
projects.summary: Designed preventative content layer for thousands of tax forms, reducing errors and support dependency through contextual guidance at moment of need.

projects.title: CGI Meditation Experiences
projects.tagline: VR meditation app for remote workers
projects.summary: Conceptualized a virtual reality meditation app addressing remote work burnout. Won first place in company-wide VR innovation challenge.

projects.title: UX/UI Work for Telecom
projects.summary: Collaborated with UX Product Designers to develop high-fidelity wireframes for enterprise B2B division products and services.

projects.title: New Engagement Sales Support
projects.summary: Created presentation decks with strong visual design and compelling narrative to showcase services and value to prospective clients.
